author: NicholasYu
description: Generate novels with AI assistance. Manage characters, foreshadowing, worldbuilding, and outlines. AI writes 80%, you inject the soul. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: NicholasYu
manifest.description: Generate novels with AI assistance. Manage characters, foreshadowing, worldbuilding, and outlines. AI writes 80%, you inject the soul.
manifest.name: InkPilot

name: InkPilot

releases.author: Nicholas-Yu
releases.description:
## Changes

- Added complete English README as primary content (addresses Obsidian review feedback)
- Kept Chinese README below English version for bilingual support
- Ensured manifest.json consistency between repository and release

## Installation

Download the three files below and place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/inkpilot/` folder:
- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

Then restart Obsidian and enable InkPilot in Settings → Community plugins.
releases.name: v1.0.3 - English README

releases.author: Nicholas-Yu
releases.description:
## Changes

- Updated manifest.json to meet Obsidian plugin submission requirements
  - Description now starts with action verb
  - Removed empty fundingUrl field
  - Updated minAppVersion to 1.4.0
- Simplified command IDs (removed redundant plugin ID prefix)
  - Obsidian automatically prefixes command IDs with plugin ID

## Installation

Download the three files below and place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/inkpilot/` folder:
- `main.js`
- `manifest.json`
- `styles.css`

Then restart Obsidian and enable InkPilot in Settings → Community plugins.
releases.name: v1.0.2 - Plugin submission ready

releases.author: Nicholas-Yu
releases.description:
Rename plugin ID from novel-assistant to inkpilot

Changes:
- Plugin ID changed to inkpilot
- All command IDs updated to inkpilot-*
- VIEW_TYPE updated to inkpilot-workspace
- Installation folder name changed to inkpilot
- Documentation updated

Note: Users need to reinstall the plugin with the new folder name (inkpilot) and reconfigure settings.
releases.name: InkPilot v1.0.1

releases.author: Nicholas-Yu
releases.description:
Initial release of InkPilot - AI co-pilot for novel writing

Features:
- Structured project management (characters, foreshadowing, worldbuilding, outlines)
- AI chapter generation with streaming output
- Consistency checking and AI-taste detection
- Knowledge base management
- Multi-provider AI support (OpenAI, Anthropic, custom)
- Cost tracking with configurable rates
- Editor integration with right-click menu
- Keyboard shortcuts support
releases.name: InkPilot v1.0.0
